hero_match.title: New Zealand vs South Africa 4th T20I
hero_match.user_agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 10; K) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Mobile Safari/537.36

summary: The New Zealand vs South Africa 4th T20I is currently live, with South Africa batting first. The AFC U20 Asian Cup 2025 has concluded. The Sheffield Shield 2024-25 final is scheduled for later this month.
